News.title: Ontario is home to the oldest baseball field in the world
News.summary: Tucked along the Thames River in the Ontario city ofLondonis a baseball field older than legendary MLB ballparks like Fenway Park and Wrigley Field, and officially recognized as the oldest continuously operating baseball diamond on the planet.

News.title: Insolvency volumes hit highest since 2009 amid strain among homeowners: Equifax

News.summary: Thousands of community and social workers across Ontario have walked off the job Monday, calling on the province to boost funding for their services.

News.title: Posters of missing teen reportedly torn down as family announces $25K reward for her safe return
